review_info.content: Absolutely gorgeous. The press-on nails are thin and not very hard, but I think they're perfectly fine. They're super sparkly and look beautiful. This is a repurchase for me, the Empress Zhou's nails, and they're very photogenic.

Xin Xiaoqi's nail art is truly amazing, and I hope they maintain this quality and price forever. I've bought from here several times, and each set is absolutely gorgeous. Not a single one has disappointed; they look just like in the live stream, with no color difference at all. The nail polishes I bought from other live streams had huge color discrepancies, and the glue they sent was not good, plus the customer service was poor. But Xin Xiaoqi's products are both affordable and high-quality. The jelly glue they provide is very sturdy; I can usually wear them for about eight or nine days without them falling off. Once, I wore a set with diamonds, and when a diamond accidentally got caught in my hair, I pulled my finger away and the nail didn't even come off. Moreover, after they fall off, the nail pieces can still be reused, and the quality of the nail pieces is excellent. There's no other store with a better cost-performance ratio than this one. With such great value for money, everyone should hurry and grab them❤️❤️❤️❤️
